reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Compre un sanguche de milanesa y un sanguche de pechuga grillada que "supuestamente" tenian lechuga y tomate. Vinieron los dos sin nada y encima nos rompieron el orto!!! No lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
I bought a breaded cutlet sandwich and a grilled chicken breast sandwich that were "supposed" to have lettuce and tomato. Both arrived completely empty, and on top of that, they ripped us off! I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJdDZfVkp3EAE
